remarks: Welcome to this beautifully maintained four-bedroom residence in the heart of New Canaan, where timeless New England colonial architecture is thoughtfully paired with modern comfort and refined living. Privately set on a picturesque property, this inviting home offers an ideal balance of entertaining spaces, everyday functionality, and unparalleled convenience. The sun-filled main level is designed for both comfortable living and sophisticated entertaining, featuring a spacious family room, an elegant formal dining room, and a thoughtfully updated kitchen appointed with high-end appliances, expansive counter space, and a breakfast area overlooking the deck and backyard. The first floor office makes working from home a breeze and the handy laundry room located next to the kitchen create even more ease. An inviting living room provides a warm and welcoming retreat, while oversized windows throughout the home bathe each room in natural light. Upstairs, the serene primary suite serves as a private sanctuary, complete with ample California Closets designed space and a beautifully recently renovated ensuite five piece bath. Three additional well-proportioned bedrooms offer exceptional flexibility for family, guests, or a secondary dedicated home office on the upper level. Newly 2026 installed hardwood floors throughout the second level further enhance the home's warmth and sophistication while the refinished first floor hardwood flooring shines.The lower level adds to the home's
